signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has driven massive capital influx and record-breaking XRPL transaction volume as of April 18, 2026, amid resolved SEC litigation and advancing XRP ETF approvals.[1]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launch Drives Spot ETF Inflows and $1
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launch Drives Spot ETF Inflows and $1.50 Price Break | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Rakuten Wallet launched on April 15, 2026, preceding XRP's first 2026 touch of $1.51094 on April 17 (closing at $1.47666), fueled by $224M in spot ETF inflows—the largest since December—shifting momentum from retail futures to institutional spot buying.[3]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | MED confidence**  
The long-standing SEC case against Ripple is now "officially in the rearview mirror," enabling heightened institutional adoption and XRP ETF approvals in final stages, though specifics on the exact resolution date are not detailed.[1]

signals.headline: On March 18, 2026, the Fed held rates steady, projecting higher inflation partly due to **tariffs** (0
signals.raw: On March 18, 2026, the Fed held rates steady, projecting higher inflation partly due to **tariffs** (0.5-0.75% of core inflation at ~3%) and only one rate cut in 2026, expecting **tariff** effects to fade mid-year[1][3].

signals.raw: Jerome **Powell** stated **tariffs** are fueling **goods inflation** early in the year as a one-time shock, with confidence in declining **tariff** inflation mid-year despite court-overturned tariffs being replaced[3][4].
